articles.title: Stock Market Live Updates Today: BSE Sensex, Nifty50 open flat in trade on mixed global cues; Asian stocks rise
articles.summary: Taiwan overtook India to become the world’s fifth-largest equity market by market capitalisation on Monday, extending a powerful rally driven by enthusiasm around artificial intelligence-related stocks. According to Bloomberg data, Taiwan’s total market value climbed to $4.95 trillion ($4,952.22 billion), edging past India’s market capitalisation of $4.92 trillion ($4,920.51 billion).

articles.title: KTET December result 2026 declared at ktet.kerala.gov.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.summary: The Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan has released the KTET December Result 2026 for the Teacher Eligibility Test conducted on February 21 & 23, 2026. Candidates can now download their scorecards from the official KTET website using their registration details.

articles.title: DRDO CEPTAM 11 Tier 2 exam 2026 to be held on June 15; city intimation slip and admit card soon at drdo.gov.in
articles.summary: The Defence Research and Development Organisation has announced the Tier 2 Computer-Based Test for the CEPTAM-11 recruitment drive. This crucial examination for Senior Technical Assistant-B and Technician-A posts is scheduled for June 15, 2026.

articles.title: CG Pre DElEd admit card 2026 released at vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in; exam on June 4: Direct link to download hall tickets
articles.summary: The Chhattisgarh Professional Examination Board has released the CG Pre DElEd admit card 2026 for the entrance examination scheduled for June 4. Candidates must download their hall tickets from the official website and verify all details promptly.

articles.title: Mumbai UG admissions 2026: Professional courses surge as BA, BSc cut-offs drop across colleges
articles.summary: Mumbai colleges are witnessing a significant shift in undergraduate admissions. Traditional BA and BSc courses are seeing lower cut-offs, while professional, career-oriented programmes in finance, healthcare, and technology are experiencing a surge in demand and competition.
